name: Shrimp Creole
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a dark roux with flour in hot oil.
2. Combine onion, celery, green bell pepper, and garlic to form a mirepoix.
3. Add the mirepoix to the roux and cook until vegetables are tender (about 10 minutes).
4. Stir in tomatoes and their juice, shrimp stock (or water), and bay leaves.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour.
6. Add shrimp and cook until they turn pink.
7. Season with salt and cayenne pepper to taste.
8. Serve over steamed rice and garnish with parsley.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
